basic_details.job_title: Mizoram PSC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Inspector of Excise & Narcotics / State Tax Officer Posts
basic_details.post_name: Inspector of Excise & Narcotics / State Tax Officer
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSSSC CGL 12256 Group B & Group C Online Form 202612,256 Posts • Group B & Group C • SSC22 Jun 202612,256 postsRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Vacancies • Technician29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Openings • OSSSC13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsCentral Bank of India 4,500 Apprentice Recruitment 20264,500 Vacancies • Apprentice • Central Bank of India22 Jun 20264,500 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Openings • Conductor05 Jul 20264,318 posts

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation is applicable for ST/SC candidates up to 5 years or as may be notified by the Government from time to time. Maximum age for Inspector of Excise & Narcotics is 30 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate or its equivalent, Bachelor’s degree, Computer Proficiency, Mizo Language Proficiency
qualification.details: Inspector of Excise & Narcotics: Graduate or its equivalent from any recognized University. Physical measurements: Height: 5’4”, Chest: Normal – 34”, Expanded – 36”. Physical Test: Race 100m – 15 secs, 800m – 3 mins. Computer Proficiency and Mizo Language Proficiency required. State Tax Officer: Bachelor’s degree from a recognized University. Computer Proficiency and Mizo Language Proficiency required.

salary_details.pay_scale: Level 7 and Level 8 of the Pay Matrix
salary_details.details: Inspector of Excise & Narcotics: Level 8 of the Pay Matrix State Tax Officer: Level 7 of the Pay Matrix

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Mizoram PSC Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Mizoram PSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Mizoram PSC Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Mizoram PSC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Mizoram PSC Inspector of Excise & Narcotics / State Tax Officer posts is 19th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum and maximum age limits for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 18 years and the maximum age limit is 35 years as of 1st January 2026. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the State Tax Officer post?
faq.answer: For the State Tax Officer post, candidates must possess a Bachelor’s degree from a recognized University. Additionally, computer proficiency and Mizo language proficiency are required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary structure for the recruited candidates?
faq.answer: The salary for the recruited candidates will be as per Level 7 and Level 8 of the Pay Matrix, depending on the specific post of Inspector of Excise & Narcotics or State Tax Officer.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment drive?
faq.answer: A total of 7 vacancies are available for the posts of Inspector of Excise & Narcotics and State Tax Officer in the Mizoram Public Service Commission recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to visit the official website of Mizoram PSC to fill out and submit their application forms.

faq.question: Q7. Are there any physical requirements for the Inspector of Excise & Narcotics post?
faq.answer: Yes, for the Inspector of Excise & Narcotics post, there are specific physical measurement requirements including height (5’4”) and chest (Normal – 34”, Expanded – 36”), along with a physical test involving a 100m race in 15 seconds and an 800m race in 3 minutes.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will be based on a Combined Competitive Examination conducted by the Mizoram Public Service Commission.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for PwBD candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) candidates applying for these posts.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article or directly from the official website of the Mizoram Public Service Commission.
